entities.name: disallowed_login_modules_config_key
entities.description: System property key used to obtain the list of disallowed JAAS login modules.

entities.name: default_disallowed_login_modules
entities.description: Default denylist policy artifact used when the disallowed login modules system property is not overridden.

entities.name: denylist_membership_check
entities.description: Membership test that blocks a login module name when it is found in the disallowed login module set.

entities.name: login_module_name
entities.description: Trimmed login module name extracted from AppConfigurationEntry and checked against the denylist.

entities.name: ldap_login_module_member
entities.description: Required blocked member that should appear in the default denylist.

entities.name: loading_jaas_login_module
entities.description: Continuing with a JAAS login module after the denylist check passes.

relations.description: The runtime denylist checked by the membership test is derived from a System.getProperty call that uses the default policy artifact as fallback.
The denylist membership test checks the trimmed login module name.
The membership check is intended to prevent dangerous login modules from proceeding.

constraints.description: The default denylist policy is vulnerable when it omits LdapLoginModule.
The vulnerable behavior occurs when the runtime branch uses the default denylist instead of a safer override.

guards.description: The policy is complete when the default denylist contains LdapLoginModule.

environment_conditions.description: An attacker can influence the JAAS configuration source that determines the login module name.
The vulnerable execution path uses the default value because org.apache.kafka.disallowed.login.modules is not set to a complete custom list.

evidence.description: The patch adds LdapLoginModule to the default denylist constant, directly indicating the missing member that defines the vulnerability.
The regression tests confirm both the default blocked behavior and the override branch behavior.

reporting.message_template: Default denylist policy is incomplete and does not block LdapLoginModule.
